metadata.name: Generate Commercial Invoice for International Shipment

description: An international order is being shipped, and it requires a commercial invoice for customs purposes.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the details for the international order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the order and its items.

nodes.task_description: For each item, verify the country of origin, value, and Harmonized System (HS) code.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all customs-related data is present and accurate.

nodes.task_description: Generate the commercial invoice document with all required information.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully generates a complete and accurate commercial invoice.
